<strong>\u2018Disapproved\u2019 products: ‘Disapproved’ products are inactive and do not appear in Google listings.
<strong>\u2018Pending\u2019 products<\/s: ‘Pending’ products are being processed by Google. They will not appear in listings until they are approved.
<strong>\u2018Expiring\u2019 products<\/: ‘Expiring’ products will become inactive and no longer appear in Google listings in the next 3 days.
<strong>\u2018Active\u2019 products<\/st: ‘Active’ products are fully approved and eligible to appear in product feed on Google.
After submission, Google assigns each pr: After submission, Google assigns each product a status: Active, Expiring, Pending, or Disapproved.
<strong>\u2018Not synced\u2019 products<: ‘Not synced’ products do not appear in Google listings. They are queued for submission, or they may be ineligible or excluded from the product feed.
Your product feed is <strong>automatical: Your product feed is automatically synced from WooCommerce to Google, every 1-2 days.
